description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the tsgkadot/sphinx-plantuml:latest Docker image. Define a single stage named build. Add a pages job that runs in the build stage, is tagged with docker, executes the shell commands "pip install -r requirements.txt -U" and "sphinx-build -b html ./source public", and publishes the resulting public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after one week. No services, caches, or special rules are required.
